subcodes.first_line: Your call hath attained unto the hearing of the Lord of Names. Both prose and verse have been observed. Blessed is the tongue that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت باصغای مالک اسما فائز نظم و نثر هردو مشاهده شد طوبی از برای لسانیکه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
